Class EggGroupRepositoryImpl

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository.EggGroupRepositoryImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
EggGroupRepository
public class EggGroupRepositoryImpl extends Object implements EggGroupRepository
Repository implementation for egg group data access and operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    LiveData<EggGroup>
    get(long id)
    Returns a single egg group by ID.
    LiveData<List<EggGroup>>
    getByBatch(long batchId)
    Returns all egg groups belonging to a given batch.
    CompletableFuture<Long>
    save(EggGroup eggGroup)
    Inserts or updates an egg group.
    CompletableFuture<List<Long>>
    saveAll(List<EggGroup> eggGroups)
    Inserts or updates multiple egg groups.

    • getByBatch

      public LiveData<List<EggGroup>> getByBatch(long batchId)
      Description copied from interface: EggGroupRepository
      Returns all egg groups belonging to a given batch.
      Specified by:
      getByBatch in interface EggGroupRepository
      Parameters:
      batchId - batch ID.
      Returns:
      live list of egg groups for the specified batch.

      public LiveData<EggGroup> get(long id)
      Description copied from interface: EggGroupRepository
      Returns a single egg group by ID.
      Specified by:
      get in interface EggGroupRepository
      Parameters:
      id - egg-group ID.
      Returns:
      live egg group with the specified ID.

    • save

      public CompletableFuture<Long> save(EggGroup eggGroup)
      Description copied from interface: EggGroupRepository
      Inserts or updates an egg group.
      Specified by:
      save in interface EggGroupRepository
      Parameters:
      eggGroup - egg group to save.
      Returns:

    • saveAll

      public CompletableFuture<List<Long>> saveAll(List<EggGroup> eggGroups)
      Description copied from interface: EggGroupRepository
      Inserts or updates multiple egg groups.
      Specified by:
      saveAll in interface EggGroupRepository
      Parameters:
      eggGroups - egg groups to save.
      Returns:
      future completing with the saved IDs in the same order.
